iran_nuke.notes: Day 18 15:00 - CRITICAL 49. Iran FM ready for prolonged war — desperation-driven proliferation risk persists. No new enrichment/test signals.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 18 15:04 - IMMINENT 100 (capped). Iran fires 4 salvos incl cluster bomb at Israel. FM Araghchi: ready to take war 'as far as necessary.' Israel plans 3+ weeks of war. Dubai airport fuel tank fire from drone. Tehran, Hamadan, Isfahan continue being bombed.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 18 15:04 - IMMINENT 100 (capped). IDF launches expanded 'targeted ground operation' — 91st Galilee division pushing deeper into S. Lebanon. Katz warns Hezbollah: disarm or face infrastructure destruction. 850+ dead, 800K displaced. Deeper incursion than previous ground maneuver.

turkey.notes: Day 18 15:04 - IMMINENT 92. NATO alliance strain continues. Germany/Japan/Australia all refuse Hormuz coalition. Trump threatens NATO future. No new Turkey-specific signals.

india.notes: Day 18 12:00 — ELEVATED 25. India evacuates 550 nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing. No escalation signals.

russia.notes: Day 18 15:04 - IMMINENT 84. Russia continues benefiting from Western disunity. No new major signals in past hour.

china.notes: Day 18 15:00 - CRITICAL 34. Trump urging China to help with Hormuz. No new escalation signals.

north_korea.notes: Day 18 15:04 - IMMINENT 68. No new signals. Kim still exploiting US security gap from ME redeployment.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 18 15:04 - IMMINENT 100 (capped). Zelensky blocks drone exports awaiting Trump-Putin talks. Russia continues barrage, 6 killed. EU Bucha sanctions.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 18 15:00 - IMMINENT 100 (capped). No new signals in hourly scan. Ongoing Kandahar strikes, 118K displaced.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: DETERIORATING (Day 18 15:04): Iran FM escalates: ready to take war 'as far as necessary.' Israel launches deeper ground push in Lebanon. Iran fires cluster bomb salvos at Israel. Dubai airport hit. Israel plans 3+ weeks of war. ZERO diplomatic progress. Hormuz coalition dead. Global score 93 STABLE at IMMINENT.

latest_news.headline: IDF launches expanded ground operation in southern Lebanon — 91st Galilee division pushes deeper
latest_news.text: IDF announces 'targeted ground operation' pushing forces deeper into south Lebanon. 91st Galilee division committed. Defense Minister Katz warns Hezbollah must be disarmed or face infrastructure destruction. Displaced Lebanese won't return until Israeli citizens safe.

latest_news.headline: Iran fires 4 missile salvos at Israel — apparent cluster bomb attack in Rishon Lezion
latest_news.text: Iran launches 4 missile salvos toward Israel. Apparent cluster bomb attack damages house in Rishon Lezion, injures one. IDF reports Iran missile launches 'greatly reduced' but still ongoing.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM: 'Ready to take war with Israel, US as far as necessary'
latest_news.text: Foreign Minister Araghchi: Iran ready to take the war 'as far as necessary.' Rejects Trump claim on talks. Contradicts any suggestion of diplomatic off-ramp.

latest_news.headline: Dubai airport fuel tank fire from Iranian drone — flights partially resumed
latest_news.text: Dubai International Airport temporarily suspended after Iranian drone hits fuel tank, sparking fire. Some flights resumed but operations disrupted.

latest_news.headline: Israel plans at least 3 more weeks of war as airstrikes pound Iran
latest_news.text: Israel says it has detailed plans for at least three more weeks of war. Strikes continue on Tehran, Hamadan, Isfahan overnight.

latest_news.headline: Trump urges China to help with Hormuz — Japan and Australia refuse coalition
latest_news.text: Trump calls on China and allies to help secure Strait of Hormuz. Japan and Australia say no plans to send ships. Hormuz coalition effort stalls further.

outlook: CRITICAL DETERIORATION (Day 18 15:04) - Global war probability 93%. (1) IRAN CONVENTIONAL IMMINENT 100: Iran fires 4 salvos incl cluster bomb at Israel. FM Araghchi: ready to take war 'as far as necessary.' Israel plans 3+ weeks of war. Dubai airport drone strike. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON IMMINENT 100: IDF launches expanded ground operation — 91st Galilee division pushes deeper. Katz warns Hezbollah to disarm. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE IMMINENT 100: Barrage continues, Zelensky awaits talks. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN IMMINENT 100. (5) DPRK IMMINENT 68. (6) RUSSIA-NATO IMMINENT 84. (7) TURKEY IMMINENT 92. (8) IRAN NUCLEAR CRITICAL 49: Proliferation risk rising as war drags on. KEY: Iran FM escalates rhetoric — 'ready to take war as far as necessary.' Israel ground push deepens in Lebanon. Cluster bomb attack on Israeli city. No ceasefire channels. Zero diplomatic progress.
